scripts.dev:api:local: HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=12145 DATABASE_URL=file:$PWD/data/covaflux.dev.db JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-me-at-least-16 BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_USERNAME=admin BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD=change-me-password HEADSCALE_CLIENT_MODE=${HEADSCALE_CLIENT_MODE:-mock} HEADSCALE_BASE_URL=${HEADSCALE_BASE_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:12147} npm run -w @covaflux/api dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w @covaflux/shared && npm run build -w @covaflux/api && npm run build -w @covaflux/web
